title: Enumerate Network Interfaces
html:
🆕 Enumerate Network Interfaces

Enumerate network interfaces on a host:

nxc smb <TARGET> -u <USERNAME> -p <PASSWORD> --interfaces
excerpt: 🆕 Enumerate Network Interfaces Enumerate network interfaces on a host: nxc smb <TARGET> -u <USERNAME> -p <PASSWORD> --interfaces Example output of the interface enumeration
